name: CIRRUS LOGIC, INC.
business: Cirrus Logic is a leader in low-power, high-precision mixed-signal processing solutions that create innovative user experiences for mobile and consumer applications. The company also develops high-performance mixed-signal (HPMS) products for smartphones and other markets.

exposures.sentence: Cirrus Logic, Inc. is a leader in low-power, high-precision mixed-signal processing solutions that create innovative user experiences for the world s top mobile and consumer applications.
The introduction of new amplifiers and codecs that target a wider range of platforms and AI-enabled PCs has positioned the Company well for continued growth in fiscal year 2027.
HPMS Products : Camera controllers, haptics and sensing solutions, and battery and power ICs .
HPMS Products : Camera controllers, haptics and sensing solutions, and battery and power ICs .
HPMS Products : Camera controllers, haptics and sensing solutions, and battery and power ICs .

AUDIO PRODUCTS Cirrus Logic is a leading supplier of low-power, low-latency, high-precision audio components that are used in a variety of applications including smartphones, PCs , tablets, AR/VR headsets, wearables, home theater systems, automotive entertainment systems and professional audio systems.

catalysts.event: Capacity Reservation and Wafer Supply Commitment Agreement with GlobalFoundries through calendar year 2026, amended to define quarterly spread
catalysts.sentence: On February 18, 2025, the Capacity Reservation Agreement was amended (the 'Amendment') to define the quarterly spread of the remaining wafer quantities under the agreement.

catalysts.event: Joined largest customer's American Manufacturing Program to develop new process technologies and manufacture at Malta, NY facility
catalysts.sentence: We recently joined our largest customer s American Manufacturing Program and are working with both our customer and GlobalFoundries to develop new process technologies for our products, including our efforts to manufacture for the first time at the Malta, New York facility.

catalysts.event: Development of next-generation camera controller components and technologies
catalysts.sentence: The Company advanced our HPMS strategy by beginning the development of next-generation camera controller components and technologies.

catalysts.event: Designing first smart power IC for FaceID implementation
catalysts.sentence: We are designing our first product in this area, a smart power IC, which represents an exciting new application space for Cirrus Logic.
